rows.label: Supabase public URL
rows.nextAction: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL in the launch environment.

rows.label: Supabase publishable key
rows.nextAction: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY; use NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY only for legacy projects.

rows.label: Migration database URL
rows.signal: DIRECT_DATABASE_URL or DATABASE_URL is present and parseable.

rows.label: Auth runtime mode
rows.signal: Requested auth mode is supabase; effective mode is supabase.
rows.nextAction: Use /auth/status after signing in to prove Supabase session to Profile mapping.

rows.label: Deployment marker
rows.signal: VERCEL_ENV is missing in this local check.
rows.nextAction: For deployed proof, run this check in the launch environment as well.
